metadata.description: Copilot CLI agent plugins from the srulys-agent-packs repository.

plugins.name: prd-pilot
plugins.description: Lightweight guided workflow that produces a high-quality EARS-style PRD fast: gather context, grill-me interrogation to close gaps, outline approval, then format with EARS best practices.

plugins.name: product-knowledge-brain
plugins.description: Maintain and evolve a Product Management knowledge base / living wiki from already-extracted text. Consolidate knowledge, link across product areas, preserve provenance and decision history, and update discovery indexes.

plugins.name: eval-pilot
plugins.description: Portable evals for Copilot agents and skills: rubric pass/fail checks, LLM-as-judge, numeric metric history, and regression gates.

plugins.name: context-pack-builder
plugins.description: Generate and update codebase context packs as progressively-disclosed Copilot Skills, with multi-layer discovery and a write+copy-back round-trip.
